description: Refactor the `saveBitmapToGallery` function in the `PhotoStamp` project (`app/src/main/java/com/example/photostamp/ImageExporter.kt`) to use Android's MediaStore API instead of legacy file paths to resolve Scoped Storage crashes on Android 10+. The updated implementation must use `ContentResolver` to insert images into `MediaStore.Images.Media.EXTERNAL_CONTENT_URI` with a MIME type of `image/jpeg` and a relative path of `Pictures/PhotoStamp`. Ensure the bitmap data is written to the resulting `OutputStream` and the code builds successfully. Permission logic is outside the scope of this task.
